overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit inside a dimly lit industrial bar. The character observes two NPCs standing by a pool table before walking past them toward a neon 'BEER' sign in the back corner.

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing two patrons standing near the pool table

notable_agents.action: woman standing with pool cue, facing the player character
shirtless man standing by the pool table, facing the woman

entered.detail: rectangular pool table with red felt surface and balls arranged for play
red neon sign spelling BEER mounted on the back wall
long counter with stools and glassware visible behind it
simple wooden stool near the foreground
metal corrugated wall panels with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial bar with warm artificial lighting. The player character in a spacesuit stands facing a pool table where two NPCs are engaged in conversation. A red neon BEER sign glows on the back wall, and wooden furniture is scattered around the wooden floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: moving through industrial bar toward the back wall

events.description: character begins walking past the pool table toward the back corner of the bar

agents.ego_description: walking past the pool table and NPCs, moving toward the neon sign and back wall

notable_agents.action: woman with pool cue remains stationary as the player passes by
shirtless man standing by the table, now seen from behind

entered.detail: wall decorations and signage on the back wall becoming visible
dark doorway or archway in the back left corner

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking forward and left, circling around the pool table. The two NPCs remain stationary by the table as the player passes them. The neon BEER sign grows larger and closer while the back wall with graffiti and a doorway comes into view. The pool table shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera moves deeper into the bar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial bar that shifts from a wide view of a social area to a close-up approach of a neon-lit corner. It begins with the player character in a spacesuit facing two NPCs engaged in conversation beside a pool table under warm artificial lighting. As the character begins walking forward and to the left, the camera circles around the pool table, causing the NPCs to slide toward the right side of the frame. The scene then expands to reveal a back wall covered in graffiti and a doorway, while the red neon BEER sign grows larger and more prominent. The movement finally carries the camera deeper into the bar, transitioning from the open wooden floor toward the glowing sign in the back corner.
